verses.text: Solomon a thunget a tawp ciangin, vantung panin meikuang hong paisukin meihal biakna leh biakpiaknate kangtum a, tua ciangin Topa' minthan'na vang biakinn sung hong dim hi
Topa' minthan'na vang biakinn dim ahih manin Topa' biakinn sungah siampite lut theilo uh hi

Israel mite khempeuh in meikuang hong paisukin Topa' minthan'na vang biakinn tungah a om a muh uh ciangin suangphah tungah leilam maingatin kun uh a, Pasian bia-in Topa' tungah lungdamna ko-in, “ Topa' tungah lungdam koh ding hoih hi; bang hang hiam cih leh ama itna kip tawntung hi,” a ci uh hi
Tua ciangin kumpipa leh mi khempeuh in Topa' mai-ah biakna pia uh hi
Kumpi Solomon in biakna-in bawngtal tul sawmnih leh tul nih, leh tuu tul za khat leh tul sawmnih pia hi. Tua bangin kumpipa leh mi khempeuh in Pasian' biakinn a ap uh hi

Siampite amau pan'mun uhah ding uh hi. Levi mite zong, Kumpi David in Topa tungah lungdam kohna dingin a bawl Topa' tungah lasakna ding lasaknate tawh ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh ama itna kip tawntung hi. David in amau' nasepna tawh phatnate a bawl ciangin tua bangin hih uh hi. Amaute tawh a kigalsai-ah siampite in peengkulte tum uh a, Israel mi khempeuh zong a ding uh hi

Tua ciangin Solomon in Topa' biakinn mai-ah a om inntual laizang ap hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Solomon in a bawl sumngo biakna tau-ah meihal biakna leh a thaute ta zolo ahih manin tua lai munah amah in meihal biakna leh thunuama biakna thaute a pia hi
Tua hun laitakin Solomon leh amah tawh a om Israel khempeuh mihon tampi in Hamath lutna panin Egypt lui ciangdongah ni sagih sung pawi a kham uh hi
Tua ciangin a ni giat ni-in amaute in a thukhupna khat nei uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in biakinn apna ni sagih sung pawi kham uh a, tua pawi ni sagih sung kibawl hi
A kha sagihna a ni thum ni-in, Topa in David leh Solomon, leh ama mi Israel tungah a hoih a bawlna hangin amah in lungdamna leh kipakna tawh a inn uhah mite a ciahsak hi.

sections.sectionTitle: Solomon tungah Topa a Nihveina Kilang

verses.text: Tua bangin Solomon in Topa' biakinn leh kumpi inn zo hi. Solomon in Topa' biakinn leh ama inn sungah hih dinga a geel khempeuh nuamtakin zo hi
Tua ciangin zanin Solomon tungah Topa kilangin ama kiangah, “Na thungetna ka za khin a, keima-a' dingin biakpiakna inn dingin hih mun ka teel khin hi
Keimah in vantungte khakcipin guah a zukloh ciang ahi a, gamsung a netum dingin kauphe thu ka piak ciang ahi a, ka mite lakah natna ka tun'sak ciang ahi zongin

keima minin a kisam ka mite amau mahmah kiniamkhiatin, thu ngenin ka mai hong zong a, amau' gitlohnate panin a kihei uh leh, keimah in vantung panin ka za ding a, amaute' khialhna maisakin a leitang uh ka hoihsak kik ding hi
Tu-in ka mitte hakin hih lai munah a kingen thungetna ka bilte in ngai ding hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh a tawntungin ka min a om theihna dingin keimah in hih biakinn teelin ka ap khin a, ka mit tawh enin ka lungsim a tawntungin tua lai-ah om ding hi
Nang-a' dingin ahih leh, na pa David a gamtat bangin keima mai-ah na gamtat a, nang kong sawl khempeuh bangin semin, ka thukhamte leh ka biakna ngeina kipte na zuih leh
na pa David tawh kiciamin, ‘Israel a uk dingin mi khat zong na kitasam kei ding hi,’ ka cih bangin na kumpi tokhom ka kipsak ding hi
Ahih hangin note kihei-in, na mai uhah ka koihsa ka thukhamte leh ka thupiaknate nusia a, pai-in pasian dangte' na semin tuate na biak uh leh

note' tungah kong piaksa leitang panin note kong botkhia ding hi. Tua ciangin ka min dingin ka apsa hih biakinn ka muhna panin ka lawnkhia ding a, mi khempeuh lakah paunak leh gentehna ka suaksak ding hi
“Tua ciangin a minthangsa hih biakinn a nawkkha khempeuh in lamdangsa-in, ‘Bang hangin hih bangin Topa in hih gam leh hih biakinn bawl ahi hiam?’ ci ding uh hi

Tua ciangin amaute in, ‘Bang hang hiam cih leh Egypt gam panin amaute a paikhiatpih a pu a pate uh Pasian ahi Topa amaute in nusia uh a, pasian dangte pom uh a, tuate bia-in a na sem uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin amah in hih bang siatna khempeuh amaute tungah tungsak hi,’ ci ding uh hi,” a ci hi.
